meta_description: Learn to run Alibaba's Qwen3-4B locally with Hugging Face Transformers. Quantize to 4-bit for low VRAM and use hybrid thinking mode to build a local AI assistant.
og_title: Run Qwen3-4B Locally: A SOTA LLM on Your Laptop
og_description: Load Qwen3-4B with Hugging Face Transformers, quantize it to 4-bit to fit in a few GB of VRAM, and use its hybrid thinking mode to power a fully local assistant brain.

structured_data.name: Qwen3-4B: A State-of-the-Art LLM That Runs on Your Laptop
structured_data.description: Load Alibaba's Qwen3-4B with Hugging Face transformers, quantize it to 4-bit so it fits in a few gigabytes of VRAM, and use its hybrid thinking mode to power a fully local assistant brain.
